mapper.select: SELECT R.REQUEST_ID AS requestId, R.BUSINESS_ID AS businessId, R.LOCATION_ID AS locationId, R.ADMIN_USER_ID AS adminUserId, R.COUPON_NAME AS couponName, R.COUPON_DESCRIPTION AS couponDescription, R.PRICE_POINT AS pricePoint, R.STOCK AS stock, R.TARGET_STATUS AS targetStatus, R.REQUEST_STATUS AS requestStatus, R.REQUEST_VERSION AS requestVersion, R.LAST_HOLD_REASON AS lastHoldReason, R.APPROVED_REWARD_ITEM_ID AS approvedRewardItemId, R.REQUESTED_AT AS requestedAt, R.RESPONDED_AT AS respondedAt, R.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, R.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, B.USER_ID AS businessUserId, B.BUSINESS_NAME AS businessName, L.NAME AS locationName, L.ADDRESS AS locationAddress, AU.NICKNAME AS adminNickname FROM LQ_BUSINESS_COUPON_REQUEST R INNER JOIN LQ_BUSINESS B ON B.BUSINESS_ID = R.BUSINESS_ID INNER JOIN LQ_LOCATION L ON L.LOCATION_ID = R.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN LQ_USER AU ON AU.USER_ID = R.ADMIN_USER_ID WHERE R.REQUEST_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LQ_BC_REQ_PK.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LQ_BUSINESS_COUPON_REQUEST ( REQUEST_ID, BUSINESS_ID, LOCATION_ID, ADMIN_USER_ID, COUPON_NAME, COUPON_DESCRIPTION, PRICE_POINT, STOCK, TARGET_STATUS, REQUEST_STATUS, REQUEST_VERSION, LAST_HOLD_REASON, APPROVED_REWARD_ITEM_ID, REQUESTED_AT, RESPONDED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{businessId}, #{locationId}, #{adminUserId}, #{couponName}, #{couponDescription}, #{pricePoint}, #{stock}, NVL(#{targetStatus}, 'ON_SALE'), NVL(#{requestStatus}, 'REQUESTED'), NVL(#{requestVersion}, 1), #{lastHoldReason}, #{approvedRewardItemId}, SYSDATE, NULL, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_BUSINESS_COUPON_REQUEST SET BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId}, LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}, ADMIN_USER_ID = #{adminUserId}, COUPON_NAME = #{couponName}, COUPON_DESCRIPTION = #{couponDescription}, PRICE_POINT = #{pricePoint}, STOCK = #{stock}, TARGET_STATUS = #{targetStatus}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}

UPDATE LQ_BUSINESS_COUPON_REQUEST SET BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId}, LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}, ADMIN_USER_ID = #{adminUserId}, COUPON_NAME = #{couponName}, COUPON_DESCRIPTION = #{couponDescription}, PRICE_POINT = #{pricePoint}, STOCK = #{stock}, TARGET_STATUS = #{targetStatus}, REQUEST_STATUS = 'REQUESTED', REQUEST_VERSION = NVL(REQUEST_VERSION, 1) + 1, LAST_HOLD_REASON = NULL, REQUESTED_AT = SYSDATE, RESPONDED_AT = NULL, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}
UPDATE LQ_BUSINESS_COUPON_REQUEST SET REQUEST_STATUS = 'HOLD', LAST_HOLD_REASON = #{holdReason}, RESPONDED_AT = SYSDATE, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}
UPDATE LQ_BUSINESS_COUPON_REQUEST SET REQUEST_STATUS = 'ACCEPTED', APPROVED_REWARD_ITEM_ID = #{approvedRewardItemId}, RESPONDED_AT = SYSDATE, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}
UPDATE LQ_BUSINESS_COUPON_REQUEST SET REQUEST_STATUS = 'CANCELLED', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}
mapper.select: SELECT H.HISTORY_ID AS historyId, H.REQUEST_ID AS requestId, H.ACTION_TYPE AS actionType, H.ACTION_ROLE AS actionRole, H.ACTION_BY_USER_ID AS actionByUserId, H.REQUEST_VERSION AS requestVersion, H.COMMENT_TEXT AS commentText, H.SNAPSHOT_COUPON_NAME AS snapshotCouponName, H.SNAPSHOT_COUPON_DESC AS snapshotCouponDesc, H.SNAPSHOT_PRICE_POINT AS snapshotPricePoint, H.SNAPSHOT_STOCK AS snapshotStock, H.SNAPSHOT_TARGET_STATUS AS snapshotTargetStatus, H.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, U.NICKNAME AS actionByNickname FROM LQ_BUSINESS_COUPON_REQ_HIST H LEFT JOIN LQ_USER U ON U.USER_ID = H.ACTION_BY_USER_ID WHERE H.REQUEST_ID = #{value} ORDER BY H.HISTORY_ID ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LQ_BC_REQ_HIS_PK.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LQ_BUSINESS_COUPON_REQ_HIST ( HISTORY_ID, REQUEST_ID, ACTION_TYPE, ACTION_ROLE, ACTION_BY_USER_ID, REQUEST_VERSION, COMMENT_TEXT, SNAPSHOT_COUPON_NAME, SNAPSHOT_COUPON_DESC, SNAPSHOT_PRICE_POINT, SNAPSHOT_STOCK, SNAPSHOT_TARGET_STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{requestId}, #{actionType}, #{actionRole}, #{actionByUserId}, #{requestVersion}, #{commentText}, #{snapshotCouponName}, #{snapshotCouponDesc}, #{snapshotPricePoint}, #{snapshotStock}, #{snapshotTargetStatus}, SYSDATE )
